name: R.C. Pro-Am
description: R.C. Pro-Am is a top-down racing game where players control radio-controlled cars competing against three AI opponents across a variety of tracks. The primary objective is to win races to earn points and upgrade the car. Each race consists of several laps around a distinct track featuring various obstacles like water puddles, oil slicks, and rumble strips. Cars can pick up item power-ups scattered throughout the track, providing offensive and defensive capabilities. These power-ups include missiles to disable opponents, bombs to leave behind as hazards, and turbo boosts for increased speed. Collecting letters R, C, P, and A, in that order, scattered around the tracks awards an upgrade for the car. Upgrades include improved speed, handling, and weaponry. Players can also purchase upgrades between races using points earned from finishing in the top positions. The game features a scrolling camera that follows the player's car, keeping it centered on the screen. The game progresses through a series of races, increasing in difficulty with more challenging tracks and aggressive AI opponents. Contact with obstacles or opponent cars slows the player's car down, potentially costing valuable time. Collisions can also cause the player to lose accumulated power-ups. Races are over when all cars have crossed the finish line. Finishing position determines the number of points awarded. The game has no ending.

controls.space: Fire weapon (missile or bomb, depending on power-up)
